qna_pairs.Query: What is the type of cuisine that South Indian Millet Swallow (Mudde) belongs to?
What type of flour is used to make South Indian Millet Swallow (Mudde)?
What is the general process of making South Indian Millet Swallow (Mudde)?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: The process involves boiling water, adding flour to make a paste, then adding the rest of the flour. The mixture is then stirred and cooked on low heat until it turns dark reddish-brown, before being pulled out and formed into balls.
